headline: ImagineAR Provides Corporate Update
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - April 10, 2026) - ImagineAR (CSE: IP) (the "Company" or "ImagineAR") today announced a strategic operational update in response to current market conditions.The Company has elected to temporarily suspend active operations of its augmented reality platform (the "AR Platform") as part of a broader initiative to optimize capital allocation and enhance long-term shareholder value. The AR Platform will be maintained in a ready state, preserving the...

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on International Paper, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: UBS  analyst Anojja Shah   maintains International Paper (NYSE:IP) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $44 to $40.
